i

**printf**: same args as sprintf, but prints the result to stdout

**fprintf**: same args as sprintf, preceded by a Node stream.  Prints the result
to the given stream.

This library is primarily used by the `--importHelpers` flag

sections.title: Installing

For the latest stable version, run:

## npm

```sh
# TypeScript 3.9.2 or later
npm install tslib

npm install tslib@1.6.1
```

sections.title: tslib
sections.content_preview:
# tslib

This is a runtime library for [TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) that contains all of the TypeScript helper functions.

This library is primarily used by the `--importHelpers` flag

sections.title: Installing
sections.content_preview:
# Installing

For the latest stable version, run:

## npm

```sh
# TypeScript 3.9.2 or later
npm install tslib

sections.title: TypeScript 3.9.2 or later
sections.content_preview:
# TypeScript 3.9.2 or later
npm install tslib

# TypeScript 3.8.4 or earlier
npm install tslib@^1

# TypeScript 2.3.2 or earlier
npm install tslib@1.6.1
```

sections.title: TypeScript 3.8.4 or earlier
sections.content_preview:

# TypeScript 2.3.2 or earlier

```

```sh
# TypeScript 3.9.2 or later
npm install tslib

sections.title: tslib
sections.content_preview:
# tslib

This is a runtime library for [TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) that contains all of the TypeScript helper functions.

This library is primarily used by the `--importHelpers` flag

sections.title: Installing
sections.content_preview:

For the latest stable version, run:

## npm

```sh
# TypeScript 3.9.2 or later
npm install tslib

```

There are many doubly-linked list implementations like it, but this
one is mine.

For when an array would be too big, and a Map can't be iterated in
reverse order.

# tslib

This is a runtime library for [TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) that contains all of the TypeScript helper functions.

This library is primarily used by the `--importHelpers` flag

sections.title: Installing
sections.content_preview:

For the latest stable version, run:

## npm

```sh
# TypeScript 3.9.2 or later
npm install tslib

# TypeScript 3.8.4 or earlier

```
